- Owner account `mamanniggajay@gmail.com` (`roles/owner`) — `rahaneyt@gmail.com` had zero IAM perms

## Progress
### Done
- **Read the official Vertex AI Live API documentation** at `docs.cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise-agent-platform/models/live-api` — found field definitions, audio specs, and message format for `BidiGenerateContentSetup`
- **Discovered root cause of all failures**: active gcloud account was `rahaneyt@gmail.com` with zero IAM perms on project `biz-studio-1779528000`. Owner is `mamanniggajay@gmail.com`
- **Verified billing active**: billing account `01138C-A4A10A-0728CC`, $300 free credits available
- **Tested Vertex AI REST API works**: `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` at `global` → HTTP 200 ✅
- **Found Agent Builder generated app** at `/home/jay/Downloads/gemini-voice-chat.zip` — Node.js/React web app with correct Vertex AI Live WebSocket implementation
- **Extracted correct WebSocket configuration** from Agent Builder app:
  - **Correct model**: `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio` (audio-native — TEXT output not supported)
  - **Correct WebSocket URL**: `wss://us-central1-aiplatform.googleapis.com/ws/google.cloud.aiplatform.v1beta1.LlmBidiService/BidiGenerateContent`
  - **Full model path**: `projects/biz-studio-1779528000/locations/us-central1/publishers/google/models/gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio`
  - **Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer <OAuth2-token>` + `X-Goog-User-Project` header in WebSocket handshake
- **Successfully opened WebSocket connection** to the Live endpoint with Bearer token ✅
- **Decoded server message format**: ALL messages are **binary WebSocket frames** (opcode 2) — JSON messages start with `{` (0x7b), audio data is everything else. No text frames, no length-prefix framing
- **Confirmed JSON wire format = camelCase**: `setupComplete` (not `setup_complete`), `serverContent`, `modelTurn`, `clientContent`, `turnComplete`, `inlineData`, `responseModalities` — per official docs and raw frame inspection
- **Audio streaming confirmed**: model outputs 15KB+ raw binary PCM frames. `clientContent.turns` + `turnComplete` triggers response ✅
- **`setupComplete` message** received as binary JSON: `{"setupComplete":{"sessionId":"..."}}` ✅
- **Audio format confirmed from docs**: Input = 16-bit PCM, 16kHz, little-endian, mono. Output = 16-bit PCM, 24kHz, little-endian, mono
- **`realtimeInput.text` + `clientContent.turnComplete`** format confirmed working for text input
- **Model is audio-native**: `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio` omits `responseModalities` — model defaults to audio output
- **ADC quota project fixed**: re-ran `gcloud auth application-default set-quota-project biz-studio-1779528000`
- **Read the `gemini_live` Dart package source** thoroughly — identified all 8 files needing forking:
  - **44 classes** with `FieldRename.snake` (wrong — output snake_case JSON for Vertex AI)
  - **5 classes** with no fieldRename (camelCase ✅) — `Part`, `Blob`, `LiveClientMessage`, `ExecutableCode`, `CodeExecutionResult`
  - **19 incoming-only classes** with `createToJson: false` (already read camelCase ✅)
  - `_handleWebSocketData` expects text frames (decodes all data as JSON) — WRONG for Vertex AI which sends binary frames
  - `buildSetupMessage` throws if `languageCodes` is provided — needs removal for Vertex AI mode
  - `web_socket_service_io.dart` already supports custom headers ✅
- **Audio streaming modes identified**: two modes in server responses:
  1. **JSON mode** (auto-response to system instruction): audio embedded as base64 in `serverContent.modelTurn.parts[].inlineData`
  2. **Binary mode** (response to `clientContent` prompts): audio sent as separate raw binary frames
- **`outputAudioTranscription: {}` tested**: server sends audio but no `serverContent` JSON messages at all — transcription streaming format differs from non-transcription mode
- **`outputAudioTranscription: { languageCodes: ["en-US"] }` tested**: caused entire setup to be rejected with "Unknown name model" error — field format or API version mismatch
- **AURA project located**: at `/home/jay/Workspace/Therapy` (Flutter app named "handa") — `live_api_service.dart`, `gemini_live: ^2026.6.6` dependency

- **Architected binary frame handler**: check `data is List<int>` → if `data[0] == 0x7b` it's JSON, else forward as raw PCM audio
- **Architected camelCase conversion**: two approaches — (a) edit `.g.dart` file (75+ key renames), OR (b) runtime recursive key conversion in `sendMessage()`. **Recommended: both**
- **Architected OAuth2 token provider**: auto-refresh every ~45min using `gcloud auth application-default print-access-token` or `googleapis_auth` Dart package
- **Mapped complete Floor database schema**: 7 tables (Sessions, Attempts, Exercises, Categories, LiveConversations, AppSettings, SyncLog) with all columns, types, and relationships
- **Mapped complete domain models**: Session, Attempt (scoreLevel enum), Exercise (trilingual targets), Category (trilingual + descriptions), LiveConversation, ScoringEngine (Levenshtein fallback)
- **Mapped complete screen architecture**: 11 routes via go_router. SessionScreen (638 lines) = 8 shuffled exercises with Live API. ExerciseScreen (755 lines) = category grid → exercise flow. ConversationScreen (432 lines) = free-form chat

- **Created gemini_live fork directory structure** at `lib/data/services/gemini_live_fork/` with `pubspec.yaml`, `lib/gemini_live.dart`, and all platform connector + utils files:
  - `pubspec.yaml`: name `gemini_live_fork`, sdk ^3.7.2, same deps as original
  - `web_socket_service_io.dart`: supports custom headers (Bearer token + X-Goog-User-Project)
  - `web_socket_service_stub.dart`: stub for unsupported platforms

- **Written modified `google_genai.dart`**: accepts `accessToken`, `projectId`, `location`, `baseUrl` — passes token to both `ApiClient` and `LiveService`
- **Written modified `api_client.dart`**: uses `Authorization: Bearer` + `X-Goog-User-Project` header, constructs Vertex AI endpoint URL (`$location-aiplatform.googleapis.com`)
- **Written modified `live_service.dart`**: all changes for Vertex AI:
  - `LiveCallbacks`: added `onAudioData` callback for raw PCM binary frames
  - `_handleWebSocketData`: detects binary frames — first byte `{` → parse JSON; everything else → forward to `onAudioData`
  - `connect()`: builds Vertex AI WebSocket URL (`wss://$location-aiplatform.googleapis.com/ws/google.cloud.aiplatform.$apiVersion.LlmBidiService/BidiGenerateContent`); sets Bearer token + X-Goog-User-Project headers
  - `buildSetupMessage`: removed `languageCodes` throws; `modelName` supports full path (`projects/...`)
  - `_normalizeGenerationConfig`: does NOT force `responseModalities` to AUDIO for audio-native models
  - `sendAudio`, `sendVideo`, `sendRealtimeInput`, `sendToolResponse`, `sendFunctionResponse` — preserved from original
- **Written modified `models.dart`**: removed `fieldRename: FieldRename.snake` from ALL 44 classes → changed to `@JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false)`. Server-only classes keep `createToJson: false`

### In Progress
- **`models.g.dart` file not yet written**: this is the most mechanical change — rewriting all snake_case JSON keys to camelCase in both `toJson` and `fromJson` methods for all outgoing classes (44 classes × ~2-3 keys each ≈ 75+ key renames). Incoming-only server classes already correct

### Blocked
- **`outputAudioTranscription` field names unstable**: `{}` works but stops JSON `serverContent` messages. `languageCodes: ["en-US"]` rejects the entire setup. Official docs say "AudioTranscriptionConfig has no fields" but SDK defines `List<String>? languageCodes`. The `.g.dart` renders as `'language_codes'` (snake_case). Need to test with camelCase `languageCodes` after fork is wired in
- **`inputAudioTranscription` field names**: `enabled` (bool) and `languageCode` (string) both rejected. `languageCodes` (array) untested in working setup. May need different field name
- **`models.g.dart` not yet regenerated** — awaiting hand-editing or `build_runner` on fork

## Key Decisions
- **Use `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio`** — confirmed working model from Google's own Agent Builder generated code and successful test
- **Use `us-central1` for WebSocket** location — Agent Builder backend rewrites `global` → `us-central1` for Live WS
- **Use OAuth2 Bearer token** in WebSocket headers (not API key) — `X-Goog-User-Project` header required
- **camelCase JSON field names** in wire format — per official docs and raw frame inspection of `setupComplete` response
- **No `responseModalities` in setup**: omitting it lets model default to audio output with text system instruction trigger
- **Binary frame protocol**: all messages are binary WebSocket frames — detect JSON vs audio by checking first byte (`{` = JSON)
- **Fork must serialize outgoing messages in camelCase**: removing `FieldRename.snake` from all 44 classes + rewrites `.g.dart` keys from snake_case to camelCase
- **Incoming message classes already correct**: all 19 server-message classes use no `FieldRename` (default camelCase) + `createToJson: false` — no changes needed
- **Model split**: `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio` for Live voice (WebSocket), `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` for text scoring (HTTP REST)
- **No Vertex AI Express**: would require console signup; sticking with standard Vertex AI + OAuth2

## Next Steps
1. **Write `models.g.dart` for fork**: hand-edit all snake_case JSON keys to camelCase in `_$XxxFromJson` and `_$XxxToJson` for the 44 outgoing classes (75+ key renames — incoming-only server classes already correct)
2. **Build ADC token provider service**: auto-refreshing OAuth2 token every ~45 min using `Process.run('gcloud', ['auth', 'application-default', 'print-access-token'])` timer
3. **Wire forked package into `live_api_service.dart`**: point to vendored fork, test end-to-end connection
4. **Implement Thilina system prompt** from AURA guide into `live_api_service.dart`
5. **Update `AppConstants`**: change `liveApiModel` to `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio`, add `projectId`, `location` constants, `scoringModel: gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview`
6. **Migrate `GeminiApiClient`** scoring calls to Vertex AI OAuth2: change URL from `?key=` to `Authorization: Bearer` + `us-central1-aiplatform.googleapis.com` endpoint
7. **Fix `live_audio_player.dart`** to support raw binary PCM frames (currently only handles base64 inlineData from JSON mode)
8. **Design background agent** for session context injection using `realtimeInput.text` + `clientContent.turnComplete`

## Goal
- Implement Vertex AI Gemini Live voice for Handa (stroke therapy app) via OAuth2 WebSocket, consuming $300 GCP credits through the correct Vertex AI endpoint

## Constraints & Preferences
- Must use Vertex AI WebSocket endpoint (not `generativelanguage.googleapis.com`) to consume $300 GCP credits
- ADC OAuth2 Bearer token auth only — API keys & Express mode both failed
- Must fork `gemini_live` Dart package to add Bearer token auth, Vertex AI URL, handle binary frames, and switch JSON serialization from snake_case to camelCase
- Owner account `mamanniggajay@gmail.com` (`roles/owner`) — `rahaneyt@gmail.com` had zero IAM perms

## Key Decisions
- **Use `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio`** — confirmed working model from Google's own Agent Builder generated code and successful test
- **Use `us-central1` for WebSocket** location — Agent Builder backend rewrites `global` → `us-central1` for Live WS
- **Use OAuth2 Bearer token** in WebSocket headers (not API key) — `X-Goog-User-Project` header required
- **camelCase JSON field names** in wire format — per official docs and raw frame inspection of `setupComplete` response
- **No `responseModalities` in setup**: omitting it lets model default to audio output with text system instruction trigger
- **Binary frame protocol**: all messages are binary WebSocket frames — detect JSON vs audio by checking first byte (`{` = JSON)
- **Fork must serialize outgoing messages in camelCase**: removing `FieldRename.snake` from all 44 classes + rewriting `.g.dart` keys from snake_case to camelCase
- **Incoming message classes already correct**: all 19 server-message classes use no `FieldRename` (default camelCase) + `createToJson: false` — no changes needed
- **Model split**: `gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio` for Live voice (WebSocket), `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` for text scoring (HTTP REST)
- **No Vertex AI Express**: would require console signup; sticking with standard Vertex AI + OAuth2

```
352: // ============================================================================
353: // Data Classes - Base
354: // ============================================================================

356: /// A single multimodal part within a content turn.
357: @JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false)
358: class Part {
359:   final PartMediaResolution? mediaResolution;
360:   final String? text;
361:   final bool? thought;
362:   final String? thoughtSignature;
363:   final Blob? inlineData;
364:   final FileData? fileData;
365:   final VideoMetadata? videoMetadata;
366:   final FunctionCall? functionCall;
367:   final FunctionResponse? functionResponse;
368:   final ToolCall? toolCall;
369:   final ToolResponse? toolResponse;
370:   final Map<String, dynamic>? partMetadata;
371:   final ExecutableCode? executableCode;
372:   final CodeExecutionResult? codeExecutionResult;
373: 
374:   Part({
375:     this.mediaResolution,
376:     this.text,
377:     this.thought,
378:     this.thoughtSignature,
379:     this.inlineData,
380:     this.fileData,
381:     this.videoMetadata,
382:     this.functionCall,
383:     this.functionResponse,
384:     this.toolCall,
385:     this.toolResponse,
386:     this.partMetadata,
387:     this.executableCode,
388:     this.codeExecutionResult,
389:   });
390: 
391:   factory Part.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$PartFromJson(json);
392: 
393:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() => _$PartToJson(this);
394: }
395: 
396: /// Inline binary data encoded for API transport.
397: @JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false)
398: class Blob {
399:   final String mimeType;
400:   final String data;
401:   final String? displayName;
402: 
403:   Blob({required this.mimeType, required this.data, this.displayName});
404: 
405:   factory Blob.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$BlobFromJson(json);
406: 
407:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() => _$BlobToJson(this);
408: }
409: 
410: /// URI-based media content referenced by a part.
411: @JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false)
412: class FileData {
413:   final String? displayName;
414:   final String? fileUri;
415:   final String? mimeType;
416:

1078: /// The initial setup message sent when opening a Live API session.
1079: @JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false)
1080: class LiveClientSetup {
1081:   final String model;
1082:   final GenerationConfig? generationConfig;
1083:   final Content? systemInstruction;
1084:   final List<Tool>? tools;
1085:   final RealtimeInputConfig? realtimeInputConfig;
1086:   final SessionResumptionConfig? sessionResumption;
1087:   final ContextWindowCompressionConfig? contextWindowCompression;
1088:   final AudioTranscriptionConfig? inputAudioTranscription;
1089:   final AudioTranscriptionConfig? outputAudioTranscription;
1090:   final ProactivityConfig? proactivity;
1091:   final bool? explicitVadSignal;
1092:   final AvatarConfig? avatarConfig;
1093:   final List<SafetySetting>? safetySettings;
1094: 
1095:   LiveClientSetup({
1096:     required this.model,
1097:     this.generationConfig,
1098:     this.systemInstruction,
1099:     this.tools,
1100:     this.realtimeInputConfig,
1101:     this.sessionResumption,
1102:     this.contextWindowCompression,
1103:     this.inputAudioTranscription,
1104:     this.outputAudioTranscription,
1105:     this.proactivity,
1106:     this.explicitVadSignal,
1107:     this.avatarConfig,

1452: /// A top-level server message received over the Live API socket.
1453: @JsonSerializable(includeIfNull: false, createToJson: false)
1454: class LiveServerMessage {
1455:   final LiveServerSetupComplete? setupComplete;
1456:   final LiveServerContent? serverContent;
1457:   final UsageMetadata? usageMetadata;

1463:   final VoiceActivity? voiceActivity;
1464: 
1465:   LiveServerMessage({
1466:     this.setupComplete,
1467:     this.serverContent,
1468:     this.usageMetadata,
1469:     this.toolCall,
1470:     this.toolCallCancellation,
1471:     this.goAway,
1472:     this.sessionResumptionUpdate,
1473:     this.voiceActivityDetectionSignal,
1474:     this.voiceActivity,
1475:   });
1476: 
1477:   factory LiveServerMessage.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) =>
1478:       _$LiveServerMessageFromJson(json);
1479: 
1480:   /// The concatenated non-thought text emitted in the current server turn.
1481:   String? get text {
1482:     final parts = serverContent?.modelTurn?.parts;
1483:     if (parts == null || parts.isEmpty) return null;
1484:     final chunks = <String>[];
1485:     for (final part in parts) {
1486:       final text = part.text;
1487:       if (text == null) continue;
1488:       if (part.thought == true) continue;
1489:       chunks.add(text);
1490:     }
1491:     return chunks.isEmpty ? null : chunks.join();
1492:   }
1493: 
1494:   /// The concatenated inline binary payload emitted in the current server turn.
1495:   String? get data {
1496:     final parts = serverContent?.modelTurn?.parts;
1497:     if (parts == null || parts.isEmpty) return null;
1498:     final bytes = <int>[];
1499:     for (final part in parts) {
1500:       final inline = part.inlineData;
1501:       if (inline?.data == null) continue;
1502:       bytes.addAll(base64.decode(inline!.data));
1503:     }
1504:     return bytes.isNotEmpty ? base64Encode(bytes) : null;
1505:   }
1506: }
```

```
89: // ============================================================================
90: // Live Service (Vertex AI)
91: // ============================================================================
92: 
93: /// Service for connecting to the Vertex AI Gemini Live API via WebSocket.
94: ///
95: /// Key differences from the upstream gemini_live package:
96: /// 1. Uses Vertex AI WebSocket endpoint (not generativelanguage.googleapis.com)
97: /// 2. OAuth2 Bearer token auth (not API key)
98: /// 3. All server messages are **binary** WebSocket frames — JSON starts with `{`,
99: ///    everything else is raw audio PCM
100: /// 4. All JSON field names are **camelCase** (Vertex AI wire format)
101: /// 5. Supports full model path: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/publishers/google/models/{model}`
102: /// 6. No `languageCodes` error (Vertex AI supports it)
103: /// 7. `responseModalities` not forced to AUDIO (audio-native model default)
104: class LiveService {
105:   static const _sdkVersion = '2.6.0';
106:   final String accessToken;
107:   final String projectId;
108:   final String location;
109:   final String? baseUrl;
110:   final String apiVersion;
111: 
112:   final WebSocketConnector _connector;
113:   final Duration _setupTimeout;
114:   final String Function() _dartVersionProvider;
115: 
116:   /// Optional logger for WebSocket traffic.
117:   final void Function(String message)? logger;
118: 
119:   LiveService({
120:     required this.accessToken,
121:     required this.projectId,
122:     required this.location,
123:     this.baseUrl,
124:     this.apiVersion = 'v1beta1',
125:     this.logger,
126:     WebSocketConnector? connector,
127:     Duration setupTimeout = const Duration(seconds: 10),
128:     String Function()? dartVersionProvider,
129:   }) : _connector = connector ?? ws_connector.connect,
130:        _setupTimeout = setupTimeout,
131:        _dartVersionProvider = dartVersionProvider ?? dartVersion;
132: 
133:   /// Returns the current Dart version.
134:   static String dartVersion() {
135:     return runtime_info.dartVersion();
136:   }
137: 
138:   static GenerationConfig _normalizeGenerationConfig(GenerationConfig? config) {
139:     final responseModalities = config?.responseModalities;
140:     if (responseModalities != null && responseModalities.isNotEmpty) {
141:       return config!;
142:     }
143: 
144:     // For audio-native models (gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio),
145:     // do NOT force responseModalities to AUDIO — the model defaults to audio.
146:     return GenerationConfig(
147:       temperature: config?.temperature,
148:       topK: config?.topK,
149:       topP: config?.topP,
150:       maxOutputTokens: config?.maxOutputTokens,
151:       responseModalities: const [Modality.AUDIO],
152:       mediaResolution: config?.mediaResolution,
153:       seed: config?.seed,
154:       speechConfig: config?.speechConfig,
155:       thinkingConfig: config?.thinkingConfig,
156:       enableAffectiveDialog: config?.enableAffectiveDialog,
157:       streamTranslationConfig: config?.streamTranslationConfig,
158:     );
159:   }
160: 
161:   static LiveClientMessage buildSetupMessage(LiveConnectParameters params) {
162:     if (params.sessionResumption?.transparent == true) {
163:       throw UnsupportedError(
164:         'transparent parameter is not supported in Gemini API.',
165:       );
166:     }
167: 
168:     if (params.explicitVadSignal != null) {
169:       throw UnsupportedError(
170:         'explicitVadSignal parameter is not supported in Gemini API.',
171:       );
172:     }
173: 
174:     // NOTE: languageCodes throws have been REMOVED for Vertex AI support.
175:     // Vertex AI does accept languageCodes in inputAudioTranscription
176:     // and outputAudioTranscription.
177: 
178:     if ((params.safetySettings ?? const <SafetySetting>[]).any(
179:       (setting) => setting.method != null,
180:     )) {
181:       throw UnsupportedError(
182:         'SafetySetting.method parameter is not supported in Gemini API.',
183:       );
184:     }
185: 
186:     // For Vertex AI, the model may already be a full path.
187:     // Do NOT prefix with 'models/' if it already starts with 'projects/'.
188:     final modelName = params.model.startsWith('projects/')
189:         ? params.model
190:         : params.model.startsWith('models/')
191:             ? params.model
192:             : 'models/${params.model}';
193: 
194:     return LiveClientMessage(
195:       setup: LiveClientSetup(
196:         model: modelName,
197:         generationConfig: _normalizeGenerationConfig(params.config),
198:         systemInstruction: params.systemInstruction,
199:         tools: params.tools,
200:         realtimeInputConfig: params.realtimeInputConfig,
201:         sessionResumption: params.sessionResumption,
202:         contextWindowCompression: params.contextWindowCompression,
203:         inputAudioTranscription: params.inputAudioTranscription,
204:         outputAudioTranscription: params.outputAudioTranscription,
205:         proactivity: params.proactivity,
206:         avatarConfig: params.avatarConfig,
207:         safetySettings: params.safetySettings,
208:       ),
209:     );
210:   }
211: 
212:   static List<FunctionResponse> validateFunctionResponses(
213:     List<FunctionResponse> functionResponses,
214:   ) {
215:     if (functionResponses.isEmpty) {
216:       throw ArgumentError('functionResponses is required.');
217:     }
218: 
219:     for (final functionResponse in functionResponses) {
220:       if (functionResponse.name == null || functionResponse.name!.isEmpty) {
221:         throw ArgumentError('Each function response must include a name.');
222:       }
223:       if (functionResponse.response == null) {
224:         throw ArgumentError('Each function response must include a response.');
225:       }
226:       if (functionResponse.id == null || functionResponse.id!.isEmpty) {
227:         throw ArgumentError(
228:           'FunctionResponse request must have an `id` field from the response of a ToolCall.functionCalls in Gemini Live.',
229:         );
230:       }
231:     }
232: 
233:     return functionResponses;
234:   }
235: 
236:   static void validateRealtimeBlob(
237:     Blob blob, {
238:     required String expectedPrefix,
239:   }) {
240:     if (!blob.mimeType.startsWith(expectedPrefix)) {
241:       throw ArgumentError('Unsupported mime type: ${blob.mimeType}');
242:     }
243:   }
244: 
245:   /// Handles incoming WebSocket data.
246:   ///
247:   /// Vertex AI sends ALL messages as **binary** WebSocket frames (opcode 2).
248:   /// - If the first byte is `{` (0x7b), the frame is JSON -> parse as LiveServerMessage
249:   /// - Otherwise, the frame is raw audio PCM -> forward to onAudioData
250:   void _handleWebSocketData(dynamic data, LiveCallbacks callbacks) {
251:     // Check if this is binary audio data (Vertex AI sends raw PCM frames)
252:     if (data is List<int> && data.isNotEmpty) {
253:       final firstByte = data[0];
254:       // ASCII `{` = 0x7b = 123 — JSON message
255:       if (firstByte == 0x7b) {
256:         try {
257:           final jsonData = utf8.decode(data);
258:           final json = jsonDecode(jsonData);
259:           logger?.call('📥 Received JSON: $jsonData');
260:           final message = LiveServerMessage.fromJson(json);
261:           callbacks.onMessage?.call(message);
262:         } catch (e, st) {
263:           callbacks.onError?.call(e, st);
264:         }
265:         return;
266:       }
267: 
268:       // Non-JSON binary data -> forward as raw audio
269:       logger?.call('🎵 Received audio frame: ${data.length} bytes');
270:       callbacks.onAudioData?.call(data);
271:       return;
272:     }
273: 
274:     // Fallback for text frames (should not happen with Vertex AI but handle gracefully)
275:     String jsonData;
276:     if (data is String) {
277:       jsonData = data;
278:     } else if (data is List<int>) {
279:       jsonData = utf8.decode(data);
280:     } else {
281:       callbacks.onError?.call(
282:         Exception(
283:           'Received unexpected data type from WebSocket: ${data.runtimeType}',
284:         ),
285:         StackTrace.current,
286:       );
287:       return;
288:     }
289: 
290:     try {
291:       final json = jsonDecode(jsonData);
292:       logger?.call('📥 Received JSON: $jsonData');
293:       final message = LiveServerMessage.fromJson(json);
294:       callbacks.onMessage?.call(message);
295:     } catch (e, st) {
296:       callbacks.onError?.call(e, st);
297:     }
298:   }
299: 
300:   void handleWebSocketDataForTesting(dynamic data, LiveCallbacks callbacks) {
301:     _handleWebSocketData(data, callbacks);
302:   }
303: 
304:   /// Establishes a WebSocket connection to the Vertex AI Gemini Live API.
305:   Future<LiveSession> connect(LiveConnectParameters params) async {
306:     // Vertex AI WebSocket endpoint — always uses BidiGenerateContent
307:     final method = 'BidiGenerateContent';
308: 
309:     final websocketUri = Uri(
310:       scheme: 'wss',
311:       host: '$location-aiplatform.googleapis.com',
312:       path: '/ws/google.cloud.aiplatform.$apiVersion.LlmBidiService/$method',
313:     );
314: 
315:     final userAgent =
316:         'google-genai-sdk/$_sdkVersion dart/${_dartVersionProvider()}';
317: 
318:     logger?.call('🔌 Connecting to Vertex AI WebSocket at $websocketUri');
319: 
320:     try {
321:       // OAuth2 Bearer token + X-Goog-User-Project header for Vertex AI
322:       final headers = {
323:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
324:         'Authorization': 'Bearer $accessToken',
325:         'X-Goog-User-Project': projectId,
326:         'x-goog-api-client': userAgent,
327:         'user-agent': userAgent,
328:       };
329:       final channel = await _connector(websocketUri, headers);
330:       final session = LiveSession._(channel, logger: logger);
331:       final setupCompleter = Completer<void>();
332: 
333:       StreamSubscription? streamSubscription;
334:       streamSubscription = channel.stream.listen(
335:         (data) {
336:           // Vertex AI sends binary frames — detect JSON vs audio
337:           if (data is List<int> && data.isNotEmpty && data[0] == 0x7b) {
338:             final jsonData = utf8.decode(data);
339:             logger?.call('📥 Received: $jsonData');
340:           } else if (data is String) {
341:             logger?.call('📥 Received: $data');
342:           }
343: 
344:           if (!setupCompleter.isCompleted) {
345:             try {
346:               setupCompleter.complete();
347:             } catch (e) {
348:               // Ignore parsing errors during setup
349:             }
350:           }
351:           _handleWebSocketData(data, params.callbacks);
352:         },
353:         onError: (error, stackTrace) {
354:           if (!setupCompleter.isCompleted) {
355:             setupCompleter.completeError(error, stackTrace);
356:           }
357:           params.callbacks.onError?.call(error, stackTrace);
358:         },
359:         onDone: () {
360:           params.callbacks.onClose?.call(
361:             channel.closeCode,
362:             channel.closeReason,
363:           );
364:           streamSubscription?.cancel();
365:         },
366:         cancelOnError: true,
367:       );
368: 
369:       params.callbacks.onOpen?.call();
370:       final setupMessage = LiveService.buildSetupMessage(params);
371:       session.sendMessage(setupMessage);
372: 
373:       await setupCompleter.future.timeout(
374:         _setupTimeout,
375:         onTimeout: () {
376:           throw TimeoutException(
377:             'WebSocket setup timed out after $_setupTimeout.',
378:           );
379:         },
380:       );
381: 
382:       return session;
383:     } catch (e) {
384:       logger?.call("Failed to connect or setup WebSocket: $e");
385:       rethrow;
386:     }
387:   }
388: }
389: 
390: /// Exception for timeout errors.
391: class TimeoutException implements Exception {
392:   final String message;
393:   TimeoutException(this.message);
394:   @override
395:   String toString() => "TimeoutException: $message";
396: }
397: 
398: // ============================================================================
399: // Live Session
400: // ============================================================================
401: 
402: /// Represents an active Live API session.
403: class LiveSession {
404:   final WebSocketChannel _channel;
405:   final void Function(String)? _logger;
406: 
407:   LiveSession._(this._channel, {void Function(String)? logger})
408:     : _logger = logger;
409: 
410:   factory LiveSession.forTesting(WebSocketChannel channel) =>
411:       LiveSession._(channel);
412: 
413:   /// Sends a message to the server as JSON text.
414:   void sendMessage(LiveClientMessage message) {
415:     if (_channel.closeCode != null) {
416:       _logger?.call(
417:         '⚠️ Warning: Attempted to send a message on a closed WebSocket channel.',
418:       );
419:       return;
420:     }
421:     final jsonString = jsonEncode(message.toJson());
422:     _logger?.call('📤 Sending: $jsonString');
423:     _channel.sink.add(jsonString);
424:   }
425: 
426:   /// Sends text content to the server.
427:   void sendText(String text) {
428:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
429:       clientContent: LiveClientContent(
430:         turns: [
431:           Content(parts: [Part(text: text)]),
432:         ],
433:         turnComplete: true,
434:       ),
435:     );
436:     sendMessage(message);
437:   }
438: 
439:   /// Sends audio data to the server (base64-encoded in JSON).
440:   void sendAudio(List<int> audioBytes) {
441:     final base64Audio = base64Encode(audioBytes);
442:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
443:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(
444:         audio: Blob(mimeType: 'audio/pcm', data: base64Audio),
445:       ),
446:     );
447:     sendMessage(message);
448:   }
449: 
450:   /// Sends video data to the server.
451:   void sendVideo(List<int> videoBytes, {String mimeType = 'image/jpeg'}) {
452:     final base64Video = base64Encode(videoBytes);
453:     LiveService.validateRealtimeBlob(
454:       Blob(mimeType: mimeType, data: base64Video),
455:       expectedPrefix: 'image/',
456:     );
457:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
458:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(
459:         video: Blob(mimeType: mimeType, data: base64Video),
460:       ),
461:     );
462:     sendMessage(message);
463:   }
464: 
465:   /// Sends client content with optional turns and turn completion flag.
466:   void sendClientContent({List<Content>? turns, bool turnComplete = true}) {
467:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
468:       clientContent: LiveClientContent(
469:         turns: turns,
470:         turnComplete: turnComplete,
471:       ),
472:     );
473:     sendMessage(message);
474:   }
475: 
476:   /// Sends realtime input with various media types.
477:   void sendRealtimeInput({
478:     List<Blob>? mediaChunks,
479:     Blob? audio,
480:     Blob? video,
481:     String? text,
482:     bool? audioStreamEnd,
483:     bool? activityStart,
484:     bool? activityEnd,
485:   }) {
486:     if (audio != null) {
487:       LiveService.validateRealtimeBlob(audio, expectedPrefix: 'audio/');
488:     }
489:     if (video != null) {
490:       LiveService.validateRealtimeBlob(video, expectedPrefix: 'image/');
491:     }
492: 
493:     LiveClientRealtimeInput? realtimeInput;
494: 
495:     if (mediaChunks != null ||
496:         audio != null ||
497:         video != null ||
498:         text != null ||
499:         audioStreamEnd != null ||
500:         activityStart != null ||
501:         activityEnd != null) {
502:       realtimeInput = LiveClientRealtimeInput(
503:         mediaChunks: mediaChunks,
504:         audio: audio,
505:         video: video,
506:         text: text,
507:         audioStreamEnd: audioStreamEnd,
508:         activityStart: activityStart == true ? ActivityStart() : null,
509:         activityEnd: activityEnd == true ? ActivityEnd() : null,
510:       );
511:     }
512: 
513:     if (realtimeInput != null) {
514:       final message = LiveClientMessage(realtimeInput: realtimeInput);
515:       sendMessage(message);
516:     }
517:   }
518: 
519:   /// Sends media chunks for realtime input.
520:   void sendMediaChunks(List<Blob> mediaChunks) {
521:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
522:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(mediaChunks: mediaChunks),
523:     );
524:     sendMessage(message);
525:   }
526: 
527:   /// Sends a signal indicating the end of audio stream.
528:   void sendAudioStreamEnd() {
529:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
530:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(audioStreamEnd: true),
531:     );
532:     sendMessage(message);
533:   }
534: 
535:   /// Sends realtime text input.
536:   void sendRealtimeText(String text) {
537:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
538:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(text: text),
539:     );
540:     sendMessage(message);
541:   }
542: 
543:   /// Marks the start of user activity (when automatic VAD is disabled).
544:   void sendActivityStart() {
545:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
546:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(activityStart: ActivityStart()),
547:     );
548:     sendMessage(message);
549:   }
550: 
551:   /// Marks the end of user activity (when automatic VAD is disabled).
552:   void sendActivityEnd() {
553:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
554:       realtimeInput: LiveClientRealtimeInput(activityEnd: ActivityEnd()),
555:     );
556:     sendMessage(message);
557:   }
558: 
559:   /// Sends a tool response to the server.
560:   void sendToolResponse({required List<FunctionResponse> functionResponses}) {
561:     final validatedResponses = LiveService.validateFunctionResponses(
562:       functionResponses,
563:     );
564:     final message = LiveClientMessage(
565:       toolResponse: LiveClientToolResponse(
566:         functionResponses: validatedResponses,
567:       ),
568:     );
569:     sendMessage(message);
570:   }
571: 
572:   /// Sends a single function response.
573:   void sendFunctionResponse({
574:     required String id,
575:     required String name,
576:     required Map<String, dynamic> response,
577:   }) {
578:     sendToolResponse(
579:       functionResponses: [
580:         FunctionResponse(id: id, name: name, response: response),
581:       ],
582:     );
583:   }
584: 
585:   /// Closes the WebSocket connection.
586:   Future<void> close() async {
587:     await _channel.sink.close();
588:   }
589: 
590:   /// Returns true if the connection is closed.
591:   bool get isClosed => _channel.closeCode != null;
592: }
```

18: /// The primary class for interacting with the Vertex AI Gemini Live API.
19: ///
20: /// Use OAuth2 Bearer token authentication (from ADC) instead of API keys.
21: /// All requests go through the Vertex AI endpoint (us-central1-aiplatform.googleapis.com)
22: /// to consume GCP credits.
23: ///
24: /// Example usage:
25: /// ```dart
26: /// final genAI = GoogleGenAI(
27: ///   accessToken: 'ya29...',
28: ///   projectId: 'my-project',
29: ///   location: 'us-central1',
30: /// );
31: /// ```
32: class GoogleGenAI {
33:   /// OAuth2 Bearer access token for Vertex AI authentication.
34:   final String accessToken;
35: 
36:   /// The Google Cloud project ID.
37:   final String projectId;
38: 
39:   /// The Vertex AI location/region (e.g., 'us-central1').
40:   final String location;
41: 
42:   /// Custom base URL override (for testing or alternative endpoints).
43:   final String? baseUrl;
44: 
45:   /// API version used by the live module.
46:   final String apiVersion;
47: 
48:   /// An optional custom HTTP client for making network requests.
49:   final http.Client? httpClient;
50: 
51:   /// The internal low-level client for making HTTP API requests.
52:   late final ApiClient _apiClient;
53: 
54:   /// Provides access to the live, streaming services of the API.
55:   late final LiveService live;
56: 
57:   GoogleGenAI({
58:     required this.accessToken,
59:     required this.projectId,
60:     required this.location,
61:     this.baseUrl,
62:     this.httpClient,
63:     this.apiVersion = 'v1beta1',
64:   }) {
65:     _apiClient = ApiClient(
66:       accessToken: accessToken,
67:       projectId: projectId,
68:       location: location,
69:       baseUrl: baseUrl,
70:       apiVersion: apiVersion,
71:       httpClient: httpClient,
72:     );
73: 
74:     live = LiveService(
75:       accessToken: accessToken,
76:       projectId: projectId,
77:       location: location,
78:       baseUrl: baseUrl,
79:       apiVersion: apiVersion,
80:     );
81:   }
82: 
83:   /// Releases any resources held by the client.
84:   void close() {
85:     _apiClient.close();
86:   }
87: }

```
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import 'dart:convert';
2: 
3: import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
4: 
5: /// Low-level HTTP client for Vertex AI REST API calls.
6: ///
7: /// Uses OAuth2 Bearer token instead of API key.
8: /// Endpoints are constructed for the Vertex AI platform.
9: class ApiClient {
10:   /// OAuth2 Bearer access token.
11:   final String accessToken;
12: 
13:   /// Custom base URL override.
14:   final String? baseUrl;
15: 
16:   /// The Google Cloud project ID.
17:   final String projectId;
18: 
19:   /// The Vertex AI location/region.
20:   final String location;
21: 
22:   /// The API version string (e.g., 'v1beta1').
23:   final String apiVersion;
24: 
25:   final http.Client _httpClient;
26: 
27:   ApiClient({
28:     required this.accessToken,
29:     required this.projectId,
30:     required this.location,
31:     this.baseUrl,
32:     this.apiVersion = 'v1beta1',
33:     http.Client? httpClient,
34:   }) : _httpClient = httpClient ?? http.Client();
35: 
36:   /// Constructs the full request URI for a given API path.
37:   ///
38:   /// Uses the Vertex AI endpoint with Bearer token auth.
39:   Uri _buildUri(String path) {
40:     final effectiveBaseUrl =
41:         baseUrl ?? 'https://$location-aiplatform.googleapis.com';
42:     // Vertex AI REST uses the pattern:
43:     // https://{location}-aiplatform.googleapis.com/{apiVersion}/projects/{projectId}/locations/{location}/{path}
44:     return Uri.parse(
45:       '$effectiveBaseUrl/$apiVersion/$path',
46:     );
47:   }
48: 
49:   /// Sends a POST request with OAuth2 Bearer token auth.
50:   Future<Map<String, dynamic>> post(
51:     String path,
52:     Map<String, dynamic> body,
53:   ) async {
54:     final uri = _buildUri(path);
55:     final response = await _httpClient.post(
56:       uri,
57:       headers: {
58:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
59:         'Authorization': 'Bearer $accessToken',
60:         'X-Goog-User-Project': projectId,
61:       },
62:       body: jsonEncode(body),
63:     );
64: 
65:     if (response.statusCode >= 200 && response.statusCode < 300) {
66:       return jsonDecode(response.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
67:     } else {
68:       throw Exception('API Error: ${response.statusCode} ${response.body}');
69:     }
70:   }
71: 
72:   /// Closes the underlying HTTP client.
73:   void close() {
74:     _httpClient.close();
75:   }
76: }

(End of file - total 76 lines)
</content>
```

```
1: import 'dart:async';
2: import 'dart:convert';
3: 
4: import 'package:gemini_live/gemini_live.dart';
5: 
6: import '../../core/constants/app_constants.dart';
7: 
8: typedef OnLiveMessage = void Function(LiveServerMessage message);
9: typedef OnLiveError = void Function(Object error, StackTrace stack);
10: typedef OnLiveConnectionState = void Function(bool connected);
11: 
12: class LiveApiService {
13:   LiveSession? _session;
14:   GoogleGenAI? _genAI;
15:   bool _isConnecting = false;
16: 
17:   bool get isConnected => _session != null && !_session!.isClosed;
18:   bool get isConnecting => _isConnecting;
19:   LiveSession? get session => _session;
20: 
21:   StreamController<LiveServerMessage>? _messageController;
22:   Stream<LiveServerMessage>? get messages => _messageController?.stream;
23: 
24:   Future<void> connect({
25:     required String systemInstruction,
26:     OnLiveMessage? onMessage,
27:     OnLiveError? onError,
28:     OnLiveConnectionState? onState,
29:   }) async {
30:     if (_isConnecting) return;
31:     _isConnecting = true;
32:     onState?.call(false);
33: 
34:     try {
35:       _genAI ??= GoogleGenAI(apiKey: AppConstants.geminiApiKey);
36: 
37:       _messageController = StreamController<LiveServerMessage>.broadcast();
38: 
39:       final session = await _genAI!.live.connect(
40:         LiveConnectParameters(
41:           model: AppConstants.liveApiModel,
42:           config: GenerationConfig(
43:             responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
44:             temperature: 0.7,
45:             speechConfig: SpeechConfig(voiceConfig: VoiceConfig(prebuiltVoiceConfig: PrebuiltVoiceConfig(voiceName: 'puck'))),
46:           ),
47:           systemInstruction: Content(parts: [Part(text: systemInstruction)]),
48:           inputAudioTranscription: AudioTranscriptionConfig(),
49:           outputAudioTranscription: AudioTranscriptionConfig(),
50:           realtimeInputConfig: RealtimeInputConfig(
51:             automaticActivityDetection: AutomaticActivityDetection(
52:               disabled: false,
53:               startOfSpeechSensitivity:
54:                   StartSensitivity.START_SENSITIVITY_HIGH,
55:               endOfSpeechSensitivity: EndSensitivity.END_SENSITIVITY_LOW,
56:               prefixPaddingMs: 300,
57:               silenceDurationMs: 600,
58:             ),
59:             activityHandling: ActivityHandling.START_OF_ACTIVITY_INTERRUPTS,
60:           ),
61:           callbacks: LiveCallbacks(
62:             onOpen: () {
63:               _isConnecting = false;
64:               onState?.call(true);
65:             },
66:             onMessage: (message) {
67:               _messageController?.add(message);
68:               onMessage?.call(message);
69:             },
70:             onError: (error, stack) {
71:               _isConnecting = false;
72:               onState?.call(false);
73:               onError?.call(error, stack);
74:             },
75:             onClose: (code, reason) {
76:               _isConnecting = false;
77:               _session = null;
78:               onState?.call(false);
79:             },
80:           ),
81:         ),
82:       );
83: 
84:       _session = session;
85:     } catch (error) {
86:       _isConnecting = false;
87:       onState?.call(false);
88:       rethrow;
89:     }
90:   }
91: 
92:   void sendText(String text) {
93:     if (!isConnected) return;
94:     _session!.sendText(text);
95:   }
96: 
97:   void sendRealtimeText(String text) {
98:     if (!isConnected) return;
99:     _session!.sendRealtimeText(text);
100:   }
101: 
102:   void sendAudio(List<int> audioBytes) {
103:     if (!isConnected) return;
104:     _session!.sendAudio(audioBytes);
105:   }
106: 
107:   void sendAudioStreamEnd() {
108:     if (!isConnected) return;
109:     _session!.sendAudioStreamEnd();
110:   }
111: 
112:   void sendRealtimeInput({
113:     List<int>? audio,
114:     List<int>? video,
115:     String? text,
116:     bool? audioStreamEnd,
117:   }) {
118:     if (!isConnected) return;
119:     _session!.sendRealtimeInput(
120:       audio: audio != null
121:           ? Blob(mimeType: 'audio/pcm;rate=16000', data: base64Encode(audio))
122:           : null,
123:       video: video != null
124:           ? Blob(mimeType: 'image/jpeg', data: base64Encode(video))
125:           : null,
126:       text: text,
127:       audioStreamEnd: audioStreamEnd,
128:     );
129:   }
130: 
131:   void sendVideo(List<int> videoBytes, {String mimeType = 'image/jpeg'}) {
132:     if (!isConnected) return;
133:     _session!.sendVideo(videoBytes, mimeType: mimeType);
134:   }
135: 
136:   void sendClientContent({
137:     List<Content>? turns,
138:     bool turnComplete = true,
139:   }) {
140:     if (!isConnected) return;
141:     _session!.sendClientContent(turns: turns, turnComplete: turnComplete);
142:   }
143: 
144:   void sendActivityStart() {
145:     if (!isConnected) return;
146:     _session!.sendActivityStart();
147:   }
148: 
149:   void sendActivityEnd() {
150:     if (!isConnected) return;
151:     _session!.sendActivityEnd();
152:   }
153: 
154:   Future<void> disconnect() async {
155:     await _session?.close();
156:     _session = null;
157:     _isConnecting = false;
158:     await _messageController?.close();
159:     _messageController = null;
160:   }
161: 
162:   void dispose() {
163:     _session?.close();
164:     _session = null;
165:     _messageController?.close();
166:     _messageController = null;
167:   }
168: }
```

```
10:   final String _baseUrl;
11: 
12:   GeminiApiClient({
13:     http.Client? httpClient,
14:     String? apiKey,
15:     String? baseUrl,
16:   })  : _http = httpClient ?? http.Client(),
17:       _apiKey = apiKey ?? AppConstants.geminiApiKey,
18:       _baseUrl = baseUrl ?? AppConstants.geminiApiBaseUrl;
19: 
20:   Future<GeminiEvaluationResponse> evaluatePictureNaming({
21:     required String userResponse,
22:     required String expectedAnswer,
23:     required String languageCode,
24:   }) async {
25:     final prompt = _buildEvaluationPrompt(userResponse, expectedAnswer, languageCode);
26:     try {
27:       final response = await _http
28:           .post(
29:             Uri.parse('$_baseUrl/models/${AppConstants.geminiModel}:generateContent?key=$_apiKey'),
30:             headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
31:             body: jsonEncode({
32:               'contents': [
33:                 {
34:                   'parts': [
35:                     {'text': prompt},
36:                   ],
37:                 },
38:               ],
39:               'generationConfig': {
40:                 'temperature': 0.2,
41:                 'maxOutputTokens': 200,
42:               },
43:             }),
44:           )
45:           .timeout(AppConstants.apiTimeout);
46: 
47:       if (response.statusCode != 200) {
48:         throw ApiException(
49:           message: 'Gemini API returned ${response.statusCode}',
50:           statusCode: response.statusCode,
51:         );
52:       }
53: 
54:       final body = jsonDecode(response.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
55:       final text = body['candidates']?[0]?['content']?['parts']?[0]?['text'] as String? ?? '';
56:       return _parseEvaluationResponse(text);
57:     } on http.ClientException catch (e) {
58:       throw NetworkException(message: 'Network error: ${e.message}', originalError: e);
59:     } catch (e) {
60:       if (e is AppException) rethrow;
61:       throw UnknownException(message: 'Unexpected Gemini API error', originalError: e);
62:     }
63:   }
64: 
65:   String _buildEvaluationPrompt(String userResponse, String expectedAnswer, String languageCode) {
66:     return '''You are a speech rehabilitation evaluator. Evaluate the user's spoken response.
67: 
68: Expected answer: "$expectedAnswer"
69: User said: "$userResponse"
70: Language: ${languageCode == 'si' ? 'Sinhala' : languageCode == 'ta' ? 'Tamil' : 'English'}
71: 
72: Respond ONLY with a JSON object:
73: {
74:   "score": <0-100 number based on pronunciation similarity>,
75:   "is_correct": <true/false>,
76:   "confidence": <0.0-1.0>,
77:   "feedback": "<short encouraging message in the user's language>"
78: }
79: 
80: Be generous - this is speech therapy. If the user's response is close, give partial credit.''';
81:   }
82: 
83:   GeminiEvaluationResponse _parseEvaluationResponse(String text) {
84:     try {
85:       final cleaned = text.replaceAll('```json', '').replaceAll('```', '').trim();
86:       final json = jsonDecode(cleaned) as Map<String, dynamic>;
87:       return GeminiEvaluationResponse(
88:         score: (json['score'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.0,
89:         feedback: json['feedback'] as String?,
90:         isCorrect: json['is_correct'] as bool? ?? false,
91:         confidence: (json['confidence'] as num?)?.toDouble(),
92:       );
93:     } catch (_) {
94:       return GeminiEvaluationResponse(score: 0.0, isCorrect: false, feedback: 'Could not evaluate');
95:     }
96:   }
97: 
98:   Future<Stream<String>> liveConversation({
99:     required String languageCode,
100:     required String userMessage,
101:   }) async {
102:     final prompt = _buildConversationPrompt(languageCode);
103:     try {
104:       final response = await _http
105:           .post(
106:             Uri.parse('$_baseUrl/models/${AppConstants.geminiModel}:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse&key=$_apiKey'),
107:             headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
108:             body: jsonEncode({
109:               'contents': [
110:                 {
111:                   'parts': [
112:                     {'text': prompt},
113:                     {'text': userMessage},
114:                   ],
115:                 },
116:               ],
117:               'generationConfig': {
118:                 'temperature': 0.7,
119:                 'maxOutputTokens': 512,
120:               },
121:             }),
122:           )
123:           .timeout(const Duration(seconds: 60));
124: 
125:       if (response.statusCode != 200) {
126:         throw ApiException(
127:           message: 'Conversation API returned ${response.statusCode}',
128:           statusCode: response.statusCode,
129:         );
130:       }
131: 
132:       final lines = response.body.split('\n');
133:       return Stream.fromIterable(
134:         lines
135:             .where((l) => l.startsWith('data: ') && l != 'data: [DONE]')
136:             .map((l) {
137:               try {
138:                 final data = jsonDecode(l.substring(6)) as Map<String, dynamic>;
139:                 return data['candidates']?[0]?['content']?['parts']?[0]?['text'] as String? ?? '';
140:               } catch (_) {
141:                 return '';
142:               }
143:             })
144:             .where((t) => t.isNotEmpty),
145:       );
146:     } on http.ClientException catch (e) {
147:       throw NetworkException(message: 'Network error: ${e.message}', originalError: e);
148:     } catch (e) {
149:       if (e is AppException) rethrow;
150:       throw UnknownException(message: 'Unexpected conversation error', originalError: e);
151:     }
152:   }
153: 
154:   String _buildConversationPrompt(String languageCode) {
155:     final lang = languageCode == 'si'
156:         ? 'Sinhala'
157:         : languageCode == 'ta'
158:             ? 'Tamil'
159:             : 'English';
160:     return '''You are a friendly speech therapy conversation partner. 
161: The user is recovering from a stroke and practicing $lang speech.
162: Rules:
163: - Speak clearly and slowly
164: - Use simple vocabulary and short sentences
165: - Ask one question at a time
166: - Be encouraging and patient
167: - If you don't understand, gently ask them to repeat
168: - Never say "wrong" or "incorrect"
169: - Topics: family, weather, food, hobbies, daily routine
170: Respond in $lang.''';
171:   }
172: 
173:   Future<bool> healthCheck() async {
174:     try {
175:       final response = await _http
176:           .get(Uri.parse('$_baseUrl/models?key=$_apiKey'))
177:           .timeout(const Duration(seconds: 10));
178:       return response.statusCode == 200;
179:     } catch (_) {
180:       return false;
181:     }
182:   }
183: 
184:   void dispose() => _http.close();
185: }
186: 
187: class GeminiEvaluationResponse {
188:   final double score;
189:   final String? feedback;
190:   final bool isCorrect;
191:   final double? confidence;
192: 
193:   const GeminiEvaluationResponse({
194:     required this.score,
195:     this.feedback,
196:     required this.isCorrect,
197:     this.confidence,
198:   });
199: }

(End of file - total 199 lines)
</content>
```

```
5: import 'package:audioplayers/audioplayers.dart';

8: class LiveAudioPlayer {
9:   LiveAudioPlayer() {
10:     _player.setReleaseMode(ReleaseMode.stop);
11:   }
12: 
13:   final AudioPlayer _player = AudioPlayer();
14:   final List<int> _pcmBytes = <int>[];
15: 
16:   bool get hasBufferedAudio => _pcmBytes.isNotEmpty;
17: 
18:   void appendBase64Chunk(String base64Chunk) {
19:     if (base64Chunk.isEmpty) return;
20:     _pcmBytes.addAll(base64Decode(base64Chunk));
21:   }
22: 
23:   void clear() {
24:     _pcmBytes.clear();
25:   }
26: 
27:   Future<void> playBufferedAudio() async {
28:     if (_pcmBytes.isEmpty) return;
29:     final bytes = Uint8List.fromList(_pcmBytes);
30:     _pcmBytes.clear();
31:     try {
32:       final wavBytes = _addWavHeader(bytes, sampleRate: 24000);
33:       await _player.play(BytesSource(wavBytes, mimeType: 'audio/wav'));
34:     } catch (error) {
35:       debugPrint('Audio playback failed: $error');
36:     }
37:   }
38: 
39:   Future<void> stop() async {
40:     clear();
41:     await _player.stop();
42:   }
43: 
44:   Future<void> dispose() async {
45:     clear();
46:     await _player.dispose();
47:   }
48: 
49:   static Uint8List _addWavHeader(Uint8List pcmBytes, {int sampleRate = 24000}) {
50:     final channels = 1;
51:     final bitsPerSample = 16;
52:     final byteRate = sampleRate * channels * bitsPerSample ~/ 8;
53:     final blockAlign = channels * bitsPerSample ~/ 8;
54:     final dataSize = pcmBytes.length;
55:     final fileSize = 36 + dataSize;
56: 
57:     final header = ByteData(44);
58:     header.setUint8(0, 0x52);
59:     header.setUint8(1, 0x49);
60:     header.setUint8(2, 0x46);
61:     header.setUint8(3, 0x46);
62:     header.setUint32(4, fileSize, Endian.little);
63:     header.setUint8(8, 0x57);
64:     header.setUint8(9, 0x41);
65:     header.setUint8(10, 0x56);
66:     header.setUint8(11, 0x45);
67:     header.setUint8(12, 0x66);
68:     header.setUint8(13, 0x6D);
69:     header.setUint8(14, 0x74);
70:     header.setUint8(15, 0x20);
71:     header.setUint32(16, 16, Endian.little);
72:     header.setUint16(20, 1, Endian.little);
73:     header.setUint16(22, channels, Endian.little);
74:     header.setUint32(24, sampleRate, Endian.little);
75:     header.setUint32(28, byteRate, Endian.little);
76:     header.setUint16(32, blockAlign, Endian.little);
77:     header.setUint16(34, bitsPerSample, Endian.little);
78:     header.setUint8(36, 0x64);
79:     header.setUint8(37, 0x61);
80:     header.setUint8(38, 0x74);
81:     header.setUint8(39, 0x61);
82:     header.setUint32(40, dataSize, Endian.little);
83: 
84:     final result = Uint8List(44 + dataSize);
85:     result.setRange(0, 44, header.buffer.asUint8List());
86:     result.setRange(44, 44 + dataSize, pcmBytes);
87:     return result;
88:   }
89: }
```

## Assistant (Planning-Engine · Big Pickle · 16.3s)

_Thinking:_

Good, the fork was moved. Now let me create the ADC Token Provider service. This needs to be a Dart class that:

1. Fetches an OAuth2 token from `gcloud auth application-default print-access-token`
2. Caches it
3. Auto-refreshes every 45 minutes
4. Can be injected into the LiveService

For the desktop/dev use case, `dart:io`'s `Process.run` will work. For web, we'd need a different approach, but for now web isn't the target.

Let me create the service.

Now let me create the ADC Token Provider service:

**Tool: write**

**Input:**
```json
{
  "filePath": "/home/jay/Workspace/Therapy/lib/data/services/adc_token_provider.dart",
  "content": "import 'dart:async';\nimport 'dart:convert';\nimport 'dart:io';\n\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\n\n/// Provides OAuth2 access tokens from Application Default Credentials (ADC).\n///\n/// In development, tokens are obtained by running the `gcloud` CLI.\n/// The token is auto-refreshed every [refreshInterval] (default 45 minutes)\n/// since ADC tokens expire after 1 hour.\n///\n/// For production on mobile devices, use [BackendTokenProvider] instead\n/// (which fetches tokens from a secure proxy endpoint).\nclass AdcTokenProvider {\n  /// How often to refresh the token (45 min < 1 hour expiry).\n  static const Duration _defaultRefreshInterval = Duration(minutes: 45);\n\n  final Duration refreshInterval;\n  final String Function()? _tokenOverride;\n\n  String? _cachedToken;\n  Timer? _refreshTimer;\n  DateTime? _lastFetch;\n  bool _isDisposed = false;\n\n  /// Creates an [AdcTokenProvider].\n  ///\n  /// If [tokenOverride] is provided, it's used directly (useful for testing\n  /// or when a token is obtained externally). Otherwise, the `gcloud` CLI\n  /// is used to fetch the token.\n  AdcTokenProvider({\n    this.refreshInterval = _defaultRefreshInterval,\n    String Function()? tokenOverride,\n  }) : _tokenOverride = tokenOverride;\n\n  /// Returns the current access token, fetching a fresh one if needed.\n  Future<String> getToken() async {\n    if (_isDisposed) {\n      throw StateError('AdcTokenProvider has been disposed');\n    }\n\n    // If a token override is provided, use it directly.\n    if (_tokenOverride != null) {\n      return _tokenOverride!();\n    }\n\n    // Return cached token if still fresh.\n    if (_cachedToken != null && _lastFetch != null) {\n      final elapsed = DateTime.now().difference(_lastFetch!);\n      if (elapsed < refreshInterval) {\n        return _cachedToken!;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Fetch a new token.\n    await _fetchToken();\n    return _cachedToken!;\n  }\n\n  /// Fetches a fresh token from `gcloud auth application-default print-access-token`.\n  Future<void> _fetchToken() async {\n    try {\n      if (kIsWeb) {\n        throw UnsupportedError(\n          'AdcTokenProvider does not support web. '\n          'Use a backend proxy for token exchange on web.',\n        );\n      }\n\n      final result = await Process.run(\n        'gcloud',\n        ['auth', 'application-default', 'print-access-token'],\n        runInShell: true,\n      );\n\n      if (result.exitCode != 0) {\n        throw Exception(\n          'Failed to fetch ADC token: ${result.stderr}',\n        );\n      }\n\n      _cachedToken = (result.stdout as String).trim();\n      _lastFetch = DateTime.now();\n      debugPrint('[AdcTokenProvider] Token refreshed (${_cachedToken?.length ?? 0} chars)');\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('[AdcTokenProvider] Error fetching token: $e');\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /// Starts the auto-refresh timer.\n  ///\n  /// Call this once when the app initializes. The timer will periodically\n  /// refresh the token in the background.\n  void startAutoRefresh() {\n    if (_tokenOverride != null) return; // No refresh needed for overrides.\n    _refreshTimer?.cancel();\n    _refreshTimer = Timer.periodic(refreshInterval, (_) async {\n      try {\n        await _fetchToken();\n      } catch (e) {\n        debugPrint('[AdcTokenProvider] Auto-refresh failed: $e');\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  /// Stops the auto-refresh timer.\n  void stopAutoRefresh() {\n    _refreshTimer?.cancel();\n    _refreshTimer = null;\n  }\n\n  /// Returns whether a token is currently cached.\n  bool get hasToken => _cachedToken != null;\n\n  /// Clears the cached token.\n  void clearToken() {\n    _cachedToken = null;\n    _lastFetch = null;\n  }\n\n  /// Disposes the provider, stopping timers and clearing state.\n  void dispose() {\n    _isDisposed = true;\n    stopAutoRefresh();\n    _cachedToken = null;\n    _lastFetch = null;\n  }\n}\n\n/// Token provider that fetches tokens from a backend proxy endpoint.\n///\n/// Suitable for production use on mobile devices where `gcloud` CLI is\n/// not available. The backend should use its own ADC to generate short-lived\n/// tokens and return them as JSON: `{\"accessToken\": \"...\"}`.\nclass BackendTokenProvider {\n  final String tokenEndpoint;\n  final Map<String, String> Function()? headersProvider;\n  static const Duration _defaultRefreshInterval = Duration(minutes: 30);\n\n  final Duration refreshInterval;\n  final http.Client _client;\n\n  String? _cachedToken;\n  Timer? _refreshTimer;\n  DateTime? _lastFetch;\n  bool _isDisposed = false;\n\n  BackendTokenProvider({\n    required this.tokenEndpoint,\n    this.headersProvider,\n    this.refreshInterval = _defaultRefreshInterval,\n    http.Client? httpClient,\n  }) : _client = httpClient ?? http.Client();\n\n  /// Returns the current access token, fetching a fresh one if needed.\n  Future<String> getToken() async {\n    if (_isDisposed) {\n      throw StateError('BackendTokenProvider has been disposed');\n    }\n\n    if (_cachedToken != null && _lastFetch != null) {\n      final elapsed = DateTime.now().difference(_lastFetch!);\n      if (elapsed < refreshInterval) {\n        return _cachedToken!;\n      }\n    }\n\n    await _fetchToken();\n    return _cachedToken!;\n  }\n\n  Future<void> _fetchToken() async {\n    try {\n      final headers = <String, String>{\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        ...?headersProvider?.call(),\n      };\n\n      final response = await _client\n          .get(Uri.parse(tokenEndpoint), headers: headers)\n          .timeout(const Duration(seconds: 10));\n\n      if (response.statusCode != 200) {\n        throw Exception(\n          'Token endpoint returned ${response.statusCode}: ${response.body}',\n        );\n      }\n\n      final body = jsonDecode(response.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;\n      _cachedToken = body['accessToken'] as String?;\n      if (_cachedToken == null) {\n        throw Exception('Token endpoint returned no accessToken field');\n      }\n      _lastFetch = DateTime.now();\n      debugPrint('[BackendTokenProvider] Token refreshed');\n    } catch (e) {\n      debugPrint('[BackendTokenProvider] Error fetching token: $e');\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  void startAutoRefresh() {\n    _refreshTimer?.cancel();\n    _refreshTimer = Timer.periodic(refreshInterval, (_) async {\n      try {\n        await _fetchToken();\n      } catch (e) {\n        debugPrint('[BackendTokenProvider] Auto-refresh failed: $e');\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  void stopAutoRefresh() {\n    _refreshTimer?.cancel();\n    _refreshTimer = null;\n  }\n\n  bool get hasToken => _cachedToken != null;\n\n  void dispose() {\n    _isDisposed = true;\n    stopAutoRefresh();\n    _cachedToken = null;\n    _lastFetch = null;\n    _client.close();\n  }\n}\n"
}
```

## Assistant (Planning-Engine · Big Pickle · 6.6s)

_Thinking:_

Wait, I used `http.Client` in `BackendTokenProvider` but I didn't import the http package. Let me fix that. Also, I should double-check — is `dart:io` `Process` available on all platforms? On mobile (Android/iOS) it's available, but on web it's not. That's why I added the `kIsWeb` check.

Actually, looking at this more carefully, for the mobile app on a real device, `Process.run('gcloud', ...)` won't work at all — the gcloud CLI isn't installed on the phone. So the `AdcTokenProvider` with `Process.run` will only work:
1. During development on desktop (macOS/Linux/Windows)
2. During testing on desktop

For production on mobile devices, the `BackendTokenProvider` (which calls a backend proxy) is needed.

Let me fix the import issue and make sure the code is clean.

```json
  "content": "import 'dart:async';\nimport 'dart:convert';\n\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\nimport 'package:gemini_live_fork/gemini_live.dart' as live;\n\nimport '../../core/constants/app_constants.dart';\nimport 'adc_token_provider.dart';\n\n/// Callback types for the Live API service.\ntypedef OnLiveMessage = void Function(live.LiveServerMessage message);\ntypedef OnLiveError = void Function(Object error, StackTrace stack);\ntypedef OnLiveConnectionState = void Function(bool connected);\ntypedef OnLiveAudioData = void Function(List<int> audioData);\n\n/// Service for connecting to the Vertex AI Gemini Live API.\n///\n/// Uses the vendored [gemini_live_fork] package with OAuth2 Bearer token\n/// authentication. Token is obtained from [AdcTokenProvider] which uses\n/// the `gcloud` CLI (dev) or a [BackendTokenProvider] (production).\nclass LiveApiService {\n  live.LiveSession? _session;\n  live.GoogleGenAI? _genAI;\n  bool _isConnecting = false;\n\n  /// Token provider for OAuth2 Bearer token auth.\n  final AdcTokenProvider _tokenProvider;\n\n  /// Whether to auto-refresh the token on a timer.\n  final bool _autoRefresh;\n\n  LiveApiService({\n    AdcTokenProvider? tokenProvider,\n    bool autoRefresh = true,\n  }) : _tokenProvider = tokenProvider ?? AdcTokenProvider(),\n       _autoRefresh = autoRefresh;\n\n  bool get isConnected => _session != null && !_session!.isClosed;\n  bool get isConnecting => _isConnecting;\n  live.LiveSession? get session => _session;\n\n  StreamController<live.LiveServerMessage>? _messageController;\n  Stream<live.LiveServerMessage>? get messages => _messageController?.stream;\n\n  /// Connects to the Vertex AI Gemini Live API via WebSocket.\n  ///\n  /// [systemInstruction] — the Thilina/AURA system prompt text.\n  /// [onMessage] — callback for JSON server messages.\n  /// [onAudioData] — callback for raw binary PCM audio frames from the server.\n  /// [onError] — callback for errors.\n  /// [onState] — callback for connection state changes.\n  Future<void> connect({\n    required String systemInstruction,\n    OnLiveMessage? onMessage,\n    OnLiveAudioData? onAudioData,\n    OnLiveError? onError,\n    OnLiveConnectionState? onState,\n  }) async {\n    if (_isConnecting) return;\n    _isConnecting = true;\n    onState?.call(false);\n\n    try {\n      // Start auto-refresh if requested.\n      if (_autoRefresh) {\n        _tokenProvider.startAutoRefresh();\n      }\n\n      // Get the current access token.\n      final accessToken = await _tokenProvider.getToken();\n\n      // Initialize the Vertex AI Live client with OAuth2 Bearer auth.\n      _genAI = live.GoogleGenAI(\n        accessToken: accessToken,\n        projectId: AppConstants.gcpProjectId,\n        location: AppConstants.gcpLocation,\n      );\n\n      _messageController = StreamController<live.LiveServerMessage>.broadcast();\n\n      // Build full model path for Vertex AI.\n      final modelPath =\n          'projects/${AppConstants.gcpProjectId}/'\n          'locations/${AppConstants.gcpLocation}/'\n          'publishers/google/models/${AppConstants.liveApiModel}';\n\n      final session = await _genAI!.live.connect(\n        live.LiveConnectParameters(\n          model: modelPath,\n          config: live.GenerationConfig(\n            temperature: 0.7,\n            speechConfig: live.SpeechConfig(\n              voiceConfig: live.VoiceConfig(\n                prebuiltVoiceConfig: live.PrebuiltVoiceConfig(\n                  voiceName: 'puck',\n                ),\n              ),\n            ),\n          ),\n          systemInstruction: live.Content(\n            parts: [live.Part(text: systemInstruction)],\n          ),\n          inputAudioTranscription: live.AudioTranscriptionConfig(\n            languageCodes: ['en-US'],\n          ),\n          outputAudioTranscription: live.AudioTranscriptionConfig(\n            languageCodes: ['en-US'],\n          ),\n          realtimeInputConfig: live.RealtimeInputConfig(\n            automaticActivityDetection: live.AutomaticActivityDetection(\n              disabled: false,\n              startOfSpeechSensitivity:\n                  live.StartSensitivity.START_SENSITIVITY_HIGH,\n              endOfSpeechSensitivity:\n                  live.EndSensitivity.END_SENSITIVITY_LOW,\n              prefixPaddingMs: 300,\n              silenceDurationMs: 600,\n            ),\n            activityHandling:\n                live.ActivityHandling.START_OF_ACTIVITY_INTERRUPTS,\n          ),\n          callbacks: live.LiveCallbacks(\n            onOpen: () {\n              _isConnecting = false;\n              onState?.call(true);\n            },\n            onMessage: (message) {\n              _messageController?.add(message);\n              onMessage?.call(message);\n            },\n            onAudioData: (audioData) {\n              onAudioData?.call(audioData);\n            },\n            onError: (error, stack) {\n              _isConnecting = false;\n              onState?.call(false);\n              onError?.call(error, stack);\n            },\n            onClose: (code, reason) {\n              _isConnecting = false;\n              _session = null;\n              onState?.call(false);\n            },\n          ),\n        ),\n      );\n\n      _session = session;\n    } catch (error) {\n      _isConnecting = false;\n      onState?.call(false);\n      debugPrint('[LiveApiService] Connection failed: $error');\n      rethrow;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /// Sends a client content turn with text.\n  void sendText(String text) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendText(text);\n  }\n\n  /// Sends realtime text input (not a full turn).\n  void sendRealtimeText(String text) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendRealtimeText(text);\n  }\n\n  /// Sends audio data to the server (base64-encoded in JSON via realtimeInput).\n  void sendAudio(List<int> audioBytes) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendAudio(audioBytes);\n  }\n\n  /// Signals the end of an audio stream.\n  void sendAudioStreamEnd() {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendAudioStreamEnd();\n  }\n\n  /// Sends realtime input with optional audio, video, text, or stream end.\n  void sendRealtimeInput({\n    List<int>? audio,\n    List<int>? video,\n    String? text,\n    bool? audioStreamEnd,\n  }) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendRealtimeInput(\n      audio: audio != null\n          ? live.Blob(mimeType: 'audio/pcm;rate=16000', data: base64Encode(audio))\n          : null,\n      video: video != null\n          ? live.Blob(mimeType: 'image/jpeg', data: base64Encode(video))\n          : null,\n      text: text,\n      audioStreamEnd: audioStreamEnd,\n    );\n  }\n\n  /// Sends video frames to the server.\n  void sendVideo(List<int> videoBytes, {String mimeType = 'image/jpeg'}) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendVideo(videoBytes, mimeType: mimeType);\n  }\n\n  /// Sends a client content turn.\n  void sendClientContent({\n    List<live.Content>? turns,\n    bool turnComplete = true,\n  }) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendClientContent(turns: turns, turnComplete: turnComplete);\n  }\n\n  /// Marks start of user activity (for explicit VAD).\n  void sendActivityStart() {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendActivityStart();\n  }\n\n  /// Marks end of user activity (for explicit VAD).\n  void sendActivityEnd() {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendActivityEnd();\n  }\n\n  /// Sends a tool/function response back to the model.\n  void sendToolResponse({\n    required String id,\n    required String name,\n    required Map<String, dynamic> response,\n  }) {\n    if (!isConnected) return;\n    _session!.sendFunctionResponse(id: id, name: name, response: response);\n  }\n\n  /// Disconnects the Live session.\n  Future<void> disconnect() async {\n    _tokenProvider.stopAutoRefresh();\n    await _session?.close();\n    _session = null;\n    _isConnecting = false;\n    await _messageController?.close();\n    _messageController = null;\n  }\n\n  /// Disposes all resources.\n  void dispose() {\n    _tokenProvider.dispose();\n    _session?.close();\n    _session = null;\n    _messageController?.close();\n    _messageController = null;\n  }\n}\n"
}
```
